Innovation • Integrity • Growth

Leading diversified industries with vision and excellence.

Cinox Holdings Global Group Limited is a dynamic holding company headquartered in Burgersfort, South Africa, bringing together a portfolio of subsidiaries across technology, media, construction, travel, investigations, hospitality, lifestyle, and hosting services.

Explore Our Subsidiaries Partner With Cinox

Group Snapshot

  • Headquarters: Burgersfort, South Africa
  • Business Model: Diversified holdings
  • Focus: World-class services and sustainable impact

About Us

Established with a vision to innovate, diversify, and lead across industries, Cinox Holdings Global Group Limited unites subsidiaries that deliver excellence and value in their respective sectors.

Our group is built on innovation, integrity, and growth, with a strong commitment to creating lasting impact in the markets we serve. Through strategic investment, expert leadership, and visionary partnerships, Cinox Holdings has grown into a trusted name across industries.

Our Subsidiaries

Cinox Smart Tech

Driving technology innovation, IT services, and smart solutions for businesses and individuals.

Cinox Media Group

A hub for creative media, digital marketing, and entertainment productions.

Cinox Construction & Civils

Specialising in construction, infrastructure development, and civil engineering projects.

Cinox Travel & Tours

Offering tailored travel experiences, corporate travel management, and tourism solutions worldwide.

Cinox InteliProbe Investigations

Delivering precision in private investigations, cybersecurity, and fraud detection services.

Shade Tree Hotels & Resorts by Cinox

Luxury hospitality and lifestyle experiences designed for comfort and elegance.

The Dreams Night Boutique Bar

A nightlife brand that combines sophistication, entertainment, and unforgettable experiences.

Cinox Web Hosting (now xHost)

Providing secure, reliable, and scalable hosting services for businesses and entrepreneurs.

Our Vision

To be a global leader in diversified investments, setting benchmarks of excellence in every sector we operate in.

Our Mission

To empower our subsidiaries to deliver world-class services and products, while creating opportunities for growth, innovation, and sustainable development.

Our Values

Innovation

Pioneering solutions for a rapidly changing world.

Integrity

Upholding trust and transparency in all dealings.

Excellence

Delivering superior results and experiences.

Growth

Building sustainable value for our stakeholders.

Contact Us

Connect with Cinox Holdings Global Group Limited to discuss partnerships, investments, and strategic opportunities.

Head Office: Burgersfort, South Africa
